title: URL Shortener
description: Turn long links into short, easy-to-share URLs.
intro: You can create short URLs without signing in. Sign in to unlock click count statistics and management.

originalUrl.label: Original URL
originalUrl.helper: Enter a full URL starting with http:// or https://.
originalUrl.errorRequired: Please enter a URL to shorten.
originalUrl.errorInvalid: Only URLs starting with http:// or https:// are allowed.

form.apiError: Failed to create the short URL. Please try again shortly.

me.title: My Short URLs
me.description: See click counts and expirations for the short URLs you created.
me.loginRequired: Please sign in to view this page.
me.error: Could not load your short URLs.
me.empty: You haven't created any short URLs yet.
me.deleteError: Failed to delete the short URL. Please try again shortly.
me.extendError: Failed to extend the short URL. Please try again later.

notFound.title: Link not found or expired
notFound.description:
The requested short link is no longer valid.
Try creating a new short URL.

openGraph.title: URL Shortener
openGraph.description: Free tool that turns long URLs into 6-character short codes for easy sharing. Choose an expiration of 1 day, 7 days, 30 days, 1 year, or never, and sign in to track click counts and manage your links. No sign-up required to get started.
